message.content:
Indianapolis morning weather (April 2, 2026):

Conditions: Cloudy with showers likely

Temperature: ~45–50°F (7–10°C) early morning

Today’s high: ~58–62°F (14–17°C) 
Extreme Weather Watch

Wind: Light to moderate, occasional gusts

Rain chance: Moderate–high (spring pattern)

Practical note:
Expect a damp commute—bring a rain layer or umbrella. Roads may be slick, but no extreme cold or severe wind concerns early today.
